title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Laurus Labs Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Laurus Labs Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Laurus Labs Capital India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Laurus Labs Capital India:
Laurus Labs Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs Capital India!
